text: <par>It is not clear which of the two syllables descends from the present root, or whether some type of reduplication is involved.</par>
<par>Guiqiong <latinform>hui⁵³</latinform> could be a different rendering of <latinform>xɯi⁵³</latinform> ‘tooth’ .</par>
<par>M1: related to <latinform>te</latinform> elsewhere? M2: related to <latinform>ja</latinform> e.g., Konyak?</par>
<par>M1: 191? wu = 2102? (if so: add LUNG to gloss)</par>
<par>Note this is apparently the same binome as Zhaba <latinform>ku⁵⁵ tʂʰu⁵³</latinform> (131162) with the order reversed.</par>
